Sign inGet started
Trust & Safety

Security

Enterprise-grade protection for every customer, by default.

Encryption

All data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.2+ and at rest using AES-256.

Access Controls

Role-based access controls ensure only authorized team members can access customer data.

Compliance

We follow SOC 2 Type II security standards.

Incident Response

We have a documented incident response plan. In the event of a breach, affected customers are notified within 72 hours.

Penetration Testing

Our platform undergoes regular third-party security audits.

Contact

Security concerns? Email security@useleadsup.com
